name: Green Chile Chicken Casserole
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cups Las Palmas Green Chile Sauce
1 cup Monterey Jack cheese, lowfat, shredded
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F. Spray a 13 x 9-inch baking dish with Pam cooking spray.
Spread the refried beans evenly in the bottom of the baking dish.
2. Place the chicken and taco seasoning mix in a large plastic bag. Shake to coat the chicken thoroughly.
Arrange the chicken breasts on top of the refried beans.
3. In a small bowl, combine the enchilada sauce and cheese; stir until well mixed.
Spoon the mixture over the chicken.
Bake for 35 to 40 minutes or until the chicken is no longer pink and juices run clear.
Calories per serving: 123
Calories from fat: 13
Total fat: 1.4g
Cholesterol: 65mg
Sodium: 72.8mg
